name: Olive Garden 5-cheese Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sun-dried tomatoes, oil; packed; minced
1 cup Spinach lasagna noodles or Regular if unavailable
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the cream sauce, melt butter over medium heat in a heavy, 1-quart saucepan. Add flour and stir until well-blended; cook until frothy.
2. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly with a wire whisk until the mixture comes to a simmer. Cook and stir until thickened (3-4 minutes).
3. Chill while mixing other ingredients. Drain and mince sun-dried tomatoes and garlic.
4. In a 3-quart mixing bowl, combine the minced tomatoes and garlic with the remaining cheese filling ingredients: ricotta cheese, eggs, grated Parmesan and Romano cheeses, salt, and black pepper.
5. Add 1-1/2 cups of cooled cream sauce to the mixture and stir until well blended. Refrigerate, reserving 1/2 cup for later use.
6. Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions, then cool under cold water and drain.
7. Arrange 3 lasagna noodles in a lightly oiled 9x13x2 baking dish, overlapping slightly.
8. Spread 1-1/2 cups of cheese filling over the noodles, sprinkle with one cup mozzarella and 1/4 cup fontina cheese.
9. Repeat pasta and cheese layering three more times, topping with remaining lasagna noodles.
10. Spread the reserved cream sauce over the top and cover lightly with foil.
11. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 1 hour. Remove from oven and keep warm at least 30 minutes before serving.
12. Serve topped with hot marinara sauce and freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
